programs.title: Below Deck
programs.desc: After a night of partying, the Ohana crew prepare for a new group of charter guests. A bad decision by Kate puts Amy and Ben in a bind as they struggle to create a birthday celebration for a charter guest.

programs.title: Below Deck
programs.sub_title: Party Dockin' In The House Tonight
programs.desc: Fraser frets that his vision for the dock party might not come to fruition. Rude and demanding charter guests terrorise the interior team. Kyle comes clean to Jess.

programs.title: The Real Housewives Of London
programs.desc: Juliet Mayhew hosts an elegant riverside lunch in Henley, hoping to bring some calm to the group, but things take a turn when Juliet Angus makes a surprise entrance and clashes with Amanda in a dramatic war of words. Meanwhile, Panthea prepares for a reception at Buckingham Palace; Nessie, Juliet Mayhew, and Amanda bond over padel; and the Juliets catch up with Caroline Stanbury for a bit of Capital gossip. Later, Panthea and Nessie meet for lunch and unpack Karen’s social media behaviour and the voice notes keeping the drama alive.

programs.title: Snapped
programs.desc: After a Florida man fails to show up for work, police believe that he left town of his own volition. As years go by, town rumors lead police to unearth a gruesome crime that had been long since buried.

programs.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programs.desc: Garcelle is in the hot seat when a distraught Erika leaves the trip early, but she refuses to roast alone. On their last day in the desert, the women wake up to a stunning exposé that leaves Kyle, Lisa and Dorit with questions. Meanwhile, Sutton calls an emergency meeting among the group - but not everyone makes the guest list.

programs.title: Judge Jerry
